rationale: Review 1's suggested fix for map_one' is circular (fiberHomeomorph_one is derived from fiberHomeomorphMonoidHom.map_one), so acting on it would fail or require restructuring with no guidance. Review 2 gives sound non-circular fixes (prove a standalone pointwise lemma via fiberHomeomorph_apply/map_proj) and additionally catches the same rfl-through-defeq pattern in instFiberMulAction and smul_fiber_mk, which Review 1 misses entirely.
